name: Valley Golf Simulators
about: Valley Golf Simulators is an indoor golf venue located in Redding, California. It offers access to golf simulators for hourly rentals and memberships. The facility is equipped with on-site attendants and can accommodate a range of events, including corporate gatherings and private parties. Pricing options include hourly reservations at $45-$50, monthly memberships at $165, and an annual membership at $1550, with online booking available for all services.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of pricing options including memberships and hourly rentals
On-site attendants for smooth service and support
Ability to host private events and parties with full venue rental

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food and non-alcoholic beverages are permitted. Catering available through partner CR Gibbs.
Beer service is available with on-site attendants.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own food and non-alcoholic beverages. The venue also offers beer service and has partnered with CR Gibbs for catering options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time it takes to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and suitable for families, as indicated by its amenities and event options.
